positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a joyful forest adventure. The central subject is a whimsical, stylized group of woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) interacting with oversized, geometrically structured mushrooms and delicate trailing vines. The scene should utilize strong, contrasting silhouettes against a soft, vibrant gradient background (forest green, sapphire blue, lavender). Use clean vector-art aesthetics with thick outlines, perfect for apparel printing. The composition is circular and balanced, placing the main group slightly off-center for visual dynamism. Highly detailed pattern elements surrounding the main group, designed to tile seamlessly. Flat color blocking with depth added by shadow lines and texture variation, inspired by vintage Scandinavian illustration. Crisp lines, clean edges, high contrast.
